---
title: "Home"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning=F, message=F, results=F, dev='svg')
```

These are the result from a project assessing the nutrient flows in the French sanitation system. Multiple sources are used: wastewater treatment plant data from water agencies, industry discharge, food intakes surveys...

In *Data preparation*, we clean and normalize the data.

In *First Synthesis*, we show some first results combining the multiple sources together.

In *Results*, we show our main results: a nitrogen and phosphorus nutrient flow analysis, and the main figures used in our articles.
